testcase.name: autoCalc > calculates work_total from previous + current
autoCalc > includes VOs in work_total
autoCalc > includes fluctuation in work_total
autoCalc > sums deductions_breakdown into total_deductions
autoCalc > calculates net_total with tax added
autoCalc > calculates net_total with tax withheld
autoCalc > calculates approved_total and approved_net_total
autoCalc > handles all-zero inputs without NaN
autoCalc > preserves existing work_total when no breakdown provided
autoCalc > auto-creates deductions_breakdown from legacy total_deductions
collection import validation > builds a stable duplicate key from project, invoice, date, amount, and reference
collection import validation > blocks exact duplicates and unknown projects
collection import validation > warns on over-collection and possible duplicates without blocking otherwise valid rows
collection import validation > blocks currency mismatch and invalid amounts
Collection Ledger — Phase 4 Tests > excludes reversed transactions from actual collected totals
Collection Ledger — Phase 4 Tests > excludes validated (not yet posted) transactions from actual totals
Collection Ledger — Phase 4 Tests > detects over-collection control issue
Collection Ledger — Phase 4 Tests > accumulates collections correctly across multiple posted rows
Collection Ledger — Phase 4 Tests > monthly cumulative totals reconcile by project
example > should pass
computeFinancialSnapshot > uses the latest IPC per project and does not double-count contract value
computeFinancialSnapshot > treats final IPC labels as latest even without a numeric max
computeFinancialSnapshot > keeps actual collections separate from forecast cash-in
computeFinancialSnapshot > uses posted collection transactions only for actual collected totals
computeFinancialSnapshot > applies month filters to collections, cash-out, and forecasts
computeFinancialSnapshot > flags stale submitted IPC with no approval after 30 days
computeFinancialSnapshot > does NOT flag stale IPC if approval_date exists
computeFinancialSnapshot > flags suspicious repeated collection amounts (3+ identical)
computeFinancialSnapshot > flags duplicate transaction fingerprints
computeFinancialSnapshot > forecast never affects actual collected totals
mergeInvoices and getInvoiceKey > getInvoiceKey > keys normal invoices by project_code::invoice_number
mergeInvoices and getInvoiceKey > getInvoiceKey > keys draft invoices by draft::id
mergeInvoices and getInvoiceKey > mergeInvoices draft de-duplication > keeps multiple draft invoices with different IDs for the same project code
mergeInvoices and getInvoiceKey > mergeInvoices draft de-duplication > overwrites draft invoices when db and ls have the same draft ID
mergeInvoices and getInvoiceKey > mergeInvoices draft de-duplication > de-duplicates normal invoices by project_code::invoice_number
mergeInvoices and getInvoiceKey > syncLocalInvoicesToSupabase > should insert a new invoice with the client-provided id
mergeInvoices and getInvoiceKey > syncLocalInvoicesToSupabase > should update an existing invoice if it already exists in Supabase
useIPCProjects helper functions > isTableMissingError > matches standard missing table / cache errors
useIPCProjects helper functions > isTableMissingError > matches unavailable error messages
testcase.system-err: GoTrueClient@sb-dwpdrclupradpnsminvi-auth-token:1 (2.106.2) 2026-06-10T11:59:43.897Z Multiple GoTrueClient instances detected in the same browser context. It is not an error, but this should be avoided as it may produce undefined behavior when used concurrently under the same storage key.

testcase.name: useIPCProjects helper functions > isTableMissingError > does not match other errors
testcase.system-err: GoTrueClient@sb-dwpdrclupradpnsminvi-auth-token:2 (2.106.2) 2026-06-10T11:59:43.913Z Multiple GoTrueClient instances detected in the same browser context. It is not an error, but this should be avoided as it may produce undefined behavior when used concurrently under the same storage key.

testcase.name: useIPCProjects helper functions > readIPCProjectsQuery table availability caching and TTL > resolves the query when table is available
testcase.system-err: GoTrueClient@sb-dwpdrclupradpnsminvi-auth-token:3 (2.106.2) 2026-06-10T11:59:43.927Z Multiple GoTrueClient instances detected in the same browser context. It is not an error, but this should be avoided as it may produce undefined behavior when used concurrently under the same storage key.

testcase.name: useIPCProjects helper functions > readIPCProjectsQuery table availability caching and TTL > caches unavailable state on table missing error and bypasses future queries
testcase.system-err: GoTrueClient@sb-dwpdrclupradpnsminvi-auth-token:4 (2.106.2) 2026-06-10T11:59:43.939Z Multiple GoTrueClient instances detected in the same browser context. It is not an error, but this should be avoided as it may produce undefined behavior when used concurrently under the same storage key.

testcase.name: useIPCProjects helper functions > readIPCProjectsQuery table availability caching and TTL > recovers and retries query after 5-minute TTL has expired
testcase.system-err: GoTrueClient@sb-dwpdrclupradpnsminvi-auth-token:5 (2.106.2) 2026-06-10T11:59:43.958Z Multiple GoTrueClient instances detected in the same browser context. It is not an error, but this should be avoided as it may produce undefined behavior when used concurrently under the same storage key.
